snippet.title: Karnan | Kandaa Vara Sollunga Lyric Video Song | Dhanush | Mari Selvaraj |  Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
#Karnan | #KandaaVaraSollunga Lyric Video Song | #Dhanush | #MariSelvaraj | #SanthoshNarayanan | #KalaipuliSThanu | #VCreations

Song: Kandaa Vara Sollunga
Vocals: Kidakkuzhi Mariyammal, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Mari Selvaraj
Composed by Santhosh Narayanan

Special thanks to Thekkambatti S Sundarrajan, Ramji Audios - Madurai
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Sai Shravanam, R K Sundar
Recording Assistants : Pranav Muniraj, NSR Sukumar
Recorded at Future Tense Studios, Prism Sound Studios, Resound India
Tapes: ‘4 Idiots’ group
Thiruvannamalai Parai Kuzhu
Arranged, Programmed by Santhosh Narayanan
‘Geoshred’ Sarangi: Navneeth Sundar
Mixed and Mastered by Sai Shravanam at Future Tense Studios
Musicians Coordinator: Meenakshi Santhosh
Karnan Chants Chorus : Arivu, Yogi Sekar, Kottur Victor, Kalyanaraman, Purushothaman,
Pranav Muniraj, Deva A, ‘Pei’ Vijay S, Sathya Thamizharasan, Karthik Raja Karuppusamy

#Karnan Tamil Movie:
Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G – S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam – R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed – Diamond Babu

Lyric Video Edited by - Madhivanan VS
Lyric video by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Audio Label: Think Music

© 2021 SPI Music Pvt. Ltd.

For All Latest Updates:

Subscribe to us on: http://www.dailymotion.com/thinkmusicindia

snippet.title: Lut Gaye (Full Song) Emraan Hashmi, Yukti | Jubin N, Tanishk B, Manoj M | Bhushan K | Radhika-Vinay
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's Lut Gaye; a romantic ballad composed by Tanishk Bagchi, penned by Manoj Muntashir and sung by Jubin Nautiyal featuring Emraan Hashmi, and Yukti Thareja. The video is directed by Radhika Rao and Vinay Sapru.

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪ 
JioSaavn: http://bit.ly/LutGaye-JioSaavn

snippet.title: Kaka | Dhund Di Khushboo  ▶ਧੁੰਦ ਦੀ ਖੁਸ਼ਬੂ | Adaab Kharoud | Official Video | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
They say, “Love is in the air”... It’s time to experience the notion with “Dhund Di Khushboo”❤️
Bringing to you one more melody by your favorite Kaka Ji🎶. 

Song Credits: 
Song: Dhund Di Khushboo
Artist: Kaka, Adaab kharoud
Music Composer and Lyricist: Kaka 
Music Director: Gavin Beats
Video Director: Sukh D
Project conceived and managed by - scope entertainment (https://instagram.com/scope.entertainment?igshid=1l8hzgstsktao)
Casting agency: Medazenith Makers
Photography: Farmer sons
Directed by: Sukh D(instagram.com/iamsukhd)
Special Thanks:  Kimberly The boarding school
Official Radio Partner - 94.3 (MY FM)


#SaregamaMusic​
#Kaka​
#DhundDiKhushboo

Lyrics: 
Dhundh di khushboo adiye ni , 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa,
Palkaan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
Ohh sadak tere pind wali ni, 
dovan da raah padayian da,
Tera hasna nai bhul skda me , 
dil kad lenda c rahiyan da
Tu pedal hi hundi c ,
me cycle te aunda c ,
Science lab vich beh k ni tenu vekh k gaane gaunda c ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
jad sardi kehar kmaundi aa,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa,,
ik latt tere mathe nu chum k , 
thodi nu c touch krdi
kahanian varge khaab mere ,
muskaan teri c sach krdi
menu eh mehsoos hunda ,
eh dhundh nahi eh tu hi aa, 
ta hi mere rom rom nu es traah galh laundi aa ,
dhund di khushboo adiye ni, 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa ,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
ik nazar pehla hi zaalam c ,
kuj surme sun hathyaar tere ,
mere wang hi marde c tere te 2,3 yaar mere ,,
ik nu tu naah kr gayi c ,
kaiyan di himaat mar gyi c jdo menu vekh k ,
has pendi sab kehnde c tenu chaundi aa,,,

Listen the song on;

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But there’s an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar 

Social Media Links

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: IPL 2021 Auction Tamil|Updated Squad List of all teams| CSK MI RCB RR DC KXIP KKR SRH|IPL NEWS TAMIL
snippet.description:
IPL 2021 Auction Tamil|Updated Squad List of all teams| CSK MI RCB RR DC KXIP KKR SRH|IPL NEWS TAMIL
IPL AUCTION 2021 TROLL | CSK TEAM PLAYERS LIST | PUJARA MOEEN ALI
IPL AUCTION 2021: FULL LIST of Players bought by IPL Teams CSK, MI, SRH, RCB, KXIP, KKR, DC & RR

#iplauction, #ipl2021, #iplauction2021

Morris becomes most expensive signing in IPL auction history
Chris Morris became the most expensive signing in IPL history on Thursday (February 18) with Rajasthan Royals forking out INR 16.25 crores for the South African all-rounder at the 2021 auction. The signing amount surpassed the INR 16 crore that Delhi Daredevils paid for Yuvraj Singh in 2015 - the previous record for a player signed at the auction.

The Royals entered the bid battle only at INR 10.25 crore mark after Mumbai Indians appeared to have wrested Morris from his previous employer - Royal Challengers Bangalore. The Jaipur franchise had to contend with another new bidder - the Punjab Kings - who entered at INR 13.50 crore and went all the way until INR 16 crore before pulling out.

The 33-year-old Morris has previously been a part of Rajasthan Royals, in the 2015 season when he scored 311 runs and took 13 wickets from 11 games. In all, he has played 70 IPL games and scored 551 runs at a strike-rate of 157.88 and taken 80 wickets at an economy of 7.81. Morris was an integral member of the RCB side last season even though an abdominal injury curtailed his participation to nine games. He took 11 wickets at an economy of 6.63. He hasn't played competitive cricket since.

IPL 2021 Auction Tamil|Updated Squad List of all teams| CSK MI RCB RR DC KXIP KKR SRH|IPL NEWS TAMIL
IPL AUCTION 2021 TROLL | CSK TEAM PLAYERS LIST | PUJARA MOEEN ALI
IPL AUCTION 2021: FULL LIST of Players bought by IPL Teams CSK, MI, SRH, RCB, KXIP, KKR, DC & RR

#iplauction, #ipl2021, #iplauction2021

Morris becomes most expensive signing in IPL auction history
Chris Morris became the most expensive signing in IPL history on Thursday (February 18) with Rajasthan Royals forking out INR 16.25 crores for the South African all-rounder at the 2021 auction. The signing amount surpassed the INR 16 crore that Delhi Daredevils paid for Yuvraj Singh in 2015 - the previous record for a player signed at the auction.

The Royals entered the bid battle only at INR 10.25 crore mark after Mumbai Indians appeared to have wrested Morris from his previous employer - Royal Challengers Bangalore. The Jaipur franchise had to contend with another new bidder - the Punjab Kings - who entered at INR 13.50 crore and went all the way until INR 16 crore before pulling out.

The 33-year-old Morris has previously been a part of Rajasthan Royals, in the 2015 season when he scored 311 runs and took 13 wickets from 11 games. In all, he has played 70 IPL games and scored 551 runs at a strike-rate of 157.88 and taken 80 wickets at an economy of 7.81. Morris was an integral member of the RCB side last season even though an abdominal injury curtailed his participation to nine games. He took 11 wickets at an economy of 6.63. He hasn't played competitive cricket since.

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.title: The Legend Of The Ice Hound (Clash Of Clans)
snippet.description:
Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

snippet.title: Living On Rs 100 For 24 HOURS in Mumbai 😱 Is it possible? No Vada Pav
snippet.description:
Hi Guys
Mumbai is considered to be a very expensive city, so I took a challenge to have all my meals in a day just for Rs 100. I tried having as healthy and hygienic food as I could, avoiding vada pav and samosa pav hehe. Check out the video to see how I fared in this challenge.
Love
Garima

PS: I am enjoying taking up these fun challenges, so tell me in the comments, what to do next.
tags: living on rs 100 for 24 hours challenge
how to survive in mumbai with less money

snippet.title: 🔴IPL Auction 2021 Full Details: किस Team ने किया Smart Buy और किस Team ने बनाया Balance?
snippet.description:
All-rounders and foreign fast bowlers fetched the big bucks at this year's IPL players' auction where South Africa's Chris Morris clinched a record-breaking Rs 16.25 crore deal with Rajasthan Royals and uncapped Karnataka player Krishnappa Gowtham also invited a bank-breaking bid.

Morris became the most expensive buy in the IPL auction history with Rajasthan Royals shelling out big money for the all-rounder even as uncapped players such as Gowtham also hogged the limelight here on Thursday.

Spin bowling all-rounder Gowtham was bought for a record Rs 9.25 crore by the Chennai Super Kings. The 32-year-old is currently with the Indian team as a net bowler for the ongoing Test series against England.

Tamil Nadu's Shahrukh Khan, named after the Bollywood superstar, expectedly got a handsome Rs 5.25 crore deal from Punjab Kings, more than 51 times his base price of Rs 20 lakh. Shahrukh has been in the limelight with his exploits in the recent Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy.

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Presenting the Tamil Sneak Peek  of CHAKRA; starring Vishal; Directed by M.S. Anandan; Music Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Vishal starrer "Chakra" is an action-thriller movie releasing on 19th February.

MS Anandan's debut film stars Vishal, Shraddha Srinath and Regina Cassandra. 'Chakra' talks about cybercrime and online scams. 

Vishal, as Chandru, is an officer who is on a mission to expose this evil act.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

snippet.description:
Singer Sunitha & Ram Veerapaneni Interview With Anchor Suma. Popular Singer Sunitha Upadrasta and Mango Mass Media CEO Ram Veerapaneni First Ever Interview on Telugu FilmNagar. On this Valentines Day, embrace the special bond watching this exclusive interview hosted by Anchor Suma. #SingerSunitha #RamVeerapaneni #AnchorSuma #SunithaRam #SunithaUpadrasta #SumaKanakala #SunithaRamInterview #ValentinesDaySpecial #TeluguFilmNagar

In the presence of many Tollywood celebrities and well-wishers, Ram Veerapaneni has tied the knot to Singer Sunitha Upadrasta recently. Watch the full interview to learn the most beautiful and interesting facts about the couple.

Singer Sunitha Upadrasta is widely known in South India for super hit songs in Telugu, Tamil and Kannada. In her glorious career started with Ee Velalo Neevu song from Gulabi as playback singer, Sunitha was honoured with many Nandi Awards and Filmfare awards. Apart from singing, Sunitha is also known as a dubbing artist for lending her voice to many star heroines. 

Ram Veerapaneni, the CEO of Mango Mass Media Pvt Ltd and Whacked Out Media Pvt Ltd, is popularly known in the Telugu media and entertainment industry for the last 23 years.

localized.description:
Singer Sunitha & Ram Veerapaneni Interview With Anchor Suma. Popular Singer Sunitha Upadrasta and Mango Mass Media CEO Ram Veerapaneni First Ever Interview on Telugu FilmNagar. On this Valentines Day, embrace the special bond watching this exclusive interview hosted by Anchor Suma. #SingerSunitha #RamVeerapaneni #AnchorSuma #SunithaRam #SunithaUpadrasta #SumaKanakala #SunithaRamInterview #ValentinesDaySpecial #TeluguFilmNagar

In the presence of many Tollywood celebrities and well-wishers, Ram Veerapaneni has tied the knot to Singer Sunitha Upadrasta recently. Watch the full interview to learn the most beautiful and interesting facts about the couple.

Singer Sunitha Upadrasta is widely known in South India for super hit songs in Telugu, Tamil and Kannada. In her glorious career started with Ee Velalo Neevu song from Gulabi as playback singer, Sunitha was honoured with many Nandi Awards and Filmfare awards. Apart from singing, Sunitha is also known as a dubbing artist for lending her voice to many star heroines. 

Ram Veerapaneni, the CEO of Mango Mass Media Pvt Ltd and Whacked Out Media Pvt Ltd, is popularly known in the Telugu media and entertainment industry for the last 23 years.

snippet.title: Radhe Shyam Telugu Glimpse | Prabhas | Pooja Hegde | Radha Krishna Kumar | Justin Prabhakaran
snippet.description:
Radhe Shyam Telugu Movie Glimpse On UV Creations. #RadheShyam 2021 Indian Romantic Drama film ft. Rebel Star Prabhas and Pooja Hegde. Written and directed by Radha Krishna Kumar. Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. Presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. The Movie releasing in Telugu, Tamil, Hindi, Kannada and Malayalam.

Glimpse Background Score: Justin Prabhakaran

The epic love tale Radhe Shyam also stars Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others.

#RadheShyamGlimpse #Prabhas #PoojaHegde #RadhaKrishnaKumar #UVCreations #TSeries #Prabhas20 #RadheShyamTeluguGlimpse #RadheShyamTeaser  #RadheShyamTeluguTeaser

snippet.title: Sidhi Bus Accident Update: इस बालिका ने अपने भाई के साथ मिलकर कई लोगों को बचा लिया ! | MPTAK
snippet.description:
मध्य प्रदेश के सीधी में मंगलवार सुबह हुए दर्दनाक बस हादसे में 38 से ज्यादा लोगों की मौत हो चुकी है। प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी और मुख्यमंत्री शिवराज सिंह चौहान ने दुर्घटना पर शोक जताते हुए पीड़ितों की हरसंभव मदद का ऐलान किया है। हादसे के ठीक बाद दुर्घटना स्थल पर सबसे पहले पहुंचने वालों में शामिल युवती शिवरानी ने अपने दम पर 2 लोगों की जान बचाई। उसने हादसे के बारे में भी विस्तार से बताया।

क्लिक कर देखें लेटेस्ट TAK फोटो गैलरी: https://www.tak.live/photogallery
---------

localized.title: Sidhi Bus Accident Update: इस बालिका ने अपने भाई के साथ मिलकर कई लोगों को बचा लिया ! | MPTAK
localized.description:
मध्य प्रदेश के सीधी में मंगलवार सुबह हुए दर्दनाक बस हादसे में 38 से ज्यादा लोगों की मौत हो चुकी है। प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी और मुख्यमंत्री शिवराज सिंह चौहान ने दुर्घटना पर शोक जताते हुए पीड़ितों की हरसंभव मदद का ऐलान किया है। हादसे के ठीक बाद दुर्घटना स्थल पर सबसे पहले पहुंचने वालों में शामिल युवती शिवरानी ने अपने दम पर 2 लोगों की जान बचाई। उसने हादसे के बारे में भी विस्तार से बताया।

क्लिक कर देखें लेटेस्ट TAK फोटो गैलरी: https://www.tak.live/photogallery
---------

मध्य प्रदेश को जानना है तो बस MPतक  ही है सहारा .. मध्य प्रदेश का सर्च इंजिन है MPतक.. 
इसके अलावा छत्तीसगढ़ की भी धड़कन है MPतक .. 
छत्तीसगढ़ की भी हर ख़बर हर जानकारी सिर्फ़ MPतक पर ।

snippet.title: Carrom Ki Rani ▶ Ramji Gulati | Jannat Zubair | Mr. Faisu | Official Video
snippet.description:
Saregama Music presents a brand new love song "Carrom Ki Rani" in the voice of "Ramji Gulati" featuring "Jannat Zubair" and  "Mr. Faisu". The song is composed by Ramji Gulati & the lyrics are penned by Moody and Akkhar. 

Audio Credits: 
👑Singer: Ramji Gulati
👑Music: Ramji Gulati
👑Lyrics: MOODY, AKKHAR
👑Arranger: Mr.Hit (UWF Studios)
👑Mixed: United White Flag Studios
👑Mastering: Donal Whelan

👑Video Director: United White Flag
👑Cast: Ramji Gulati - Jannat Zubair - Mr. Faisu
👑Special Appearance: Ayaan Zubair Rahmani
👑Dop : Rahul Arora
👑Editor : Varun Arora
👑VFX : Lucky Tan
👑Drone : Tanish Arora
👑Styling : Dharti Gulati
👑Choreographer : Amit Syal
👑Production : Akshay Kapoor (Aay Kay Dubai)
👑Poster Designs: F1 Digitals
👑Make-up & Hair: Vicky hans
👑Photography: Anish S Ajmera
👑Team UWF: Aashish Prasad, Dr. Deep, Mr. Hit
👑Artist Management:
👑Ramji Gulati - Purple Star Entertainment
👑Mr. Faisu - Qyuki 

👑Special Thanks: Riverland Dubai, Dubai Parks & Resort

#SaregamaMusic
#JannatZubair
#Faisu
#RamjiGulati
#Fainat
#CarromKiRani

Lyrics: 
Mujhko Paake Tu Lucky Feel Karegi,
Dil Mein Reh Ke Saath Kya Dil Ki Deal Karegi,

Mujhko Paake Tu Lucky Feel Karegi,
Dil Mein Reh Ke Saath Kya Dil Ki Deal Karegi,

Jaise Sapno Mein Dekhi Thi Haan Bilkul Waisi Hai By God Tu,

Carrom Ki Rani Na Chodhta
Tujhe Kese Chordh Du

Teri Photo Laga Rakhi Hai,
Mene Apni Wall Pe,
Baat Karade Mana Lunga,
Tere Ghar Wale Ek Call Pe,

Teri Photo Laga Rakhi Hai,
Mene Apni Wall Pe,
Baat Karade Mana Lunga,
Tere Ghar Wale Ek Call Pe,

Main Kuch Bhi Kar Jaunga Tere Liye,
Ek Baar Bol Tu,

Carrom Ki Rani Ni Chodhta
Tujhe Kese Chordh Du

Mere Sath Rehne Ka,
Ek Bar Iraada Karle Tu,
Tujhe Beach Pasand Hai Baby,
Tujhe Beach Pe Ghar Le Dun,

Mere Sath Rehne Ka,
Ek Bar Iraada Karle Tu,
Tujhe Beach Pasand Hai Baby,
Tujhe Beach Pe Ghar Le Dun,

Tere Saath Mein Photo Daal Ke 
Sab Ladkiyo Ke Dil Tod Du

Carrom Ki Rani Ni Chodhta
Tujhe Kese Chordh Du

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Episode 3105: Bhogilal Fooled Jethalal
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal has finally meet Bhogilal but Bhogilal smartly makes an emotional story that his partner has cheated on him and taken all the money and also because of the corona the business is not doing great and starts crying so by seeing Bhogilal in this position Jethalal get emotional and sympathies with him. As Jethalal goes out of Bhogilal's office Bhogilal laugh and says he successfully fooled Jethalal. Catch the fun and watch the full episode.


More Useful Links :

Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Jaipur में किसानों का ‘Rail रोको’, Train रोके जाने से यात्री हुए परेशान
snippet.description:
कृषि कानूनों (Agricultural laws) के खिलाफ किसानों ने 18 फरवरी को देशव्यापी ‘रेल रोको आंदोलन’ (Rail Roko Andolan) किया. किसानों ने गुरुवार को दोपहर 12 बजे से लेकर शाम 4 बजे तक ‘रेल रोको’ (Rail Roko) का ऐलान किया था. इसका असर देशभर में देखने को मिला. कई जगह ट्रेनें रोकी गई. जिससे रेल यात्रियों को भी खासा दिक्कतों का भी सामना करना पड़ा. ‘रेल रोको’ (Rail Roko) का असर कुछ जयपुर में भी देखने को मिला. यहां किसानों ने दिल्ली-पोरबंदर ट्रेन को रोककर अपना विरोध जताया. इस बीच, रेल पटरियों पर किसानों के साथ विरोध प्रदर्शन में कांग्रेस के कार्यकर्ता भी दिखे.

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

localized.title: Jaipur में किसानों का ‘Rail रोको’, Train रोके जाने से यात्री हुए परेशान
localized.description:
कृषि कानूनों (Agricultural laws) के खिलाफ किसानों ने 18 फरवरी को देशव्यापी ‘रेल रोको आंदोलन’ (Rail Roko Andolan) किया. किसानों ने गुरुवार को दोपहर 12 बजे से लेकर शाम 4 बजे तक ‘रेल रोको’ (Rail Roko) का ऐलान किया था. इसका असर देशभर में देखने को मिला. कई जगह ट्रेनें रोकी गई. जिससे रेल यात्रियों को भी खासा दिक्कतों का भी सामना करना पड़ा. ‘रेल रोको’ (Rail Roko) का असर कुछ जयपुर में भी देखने को मिला. यहां किसानों ने दिल्ली-पोरबंदर ट्रेन को रोककर अपना विरोध जताया. इस बीच, रेल पटरियों पर किसानों के साथ विरोध प्रदर्शन में कांग्रेस के कार्यकर्ता भी दिखे.

snippet.title: Hello Mini 2 | Official Trailer | Anuja Joshi | MX Original Series | MX Player
snippet.description:
This time the dare is to stay alive. Kya Mini kar paayegi stranger ke iss game ko survive?

#HelloMini2, releases 26 February.

#MXOriginalSeries #MXPlayer #HelloMini

Directed by Arjun Srivasstava

Key Cast: Anuja Joshi, Mrinal Dutt, Gaurav Chopra, Darshana Banik, Anshul Pandey, Nikhita Chopra, Abhinav Sharma, Ambika Nayak, Summer Jacobs, Joy Sengupta and Vinit Sharma

About Hello Mini 2:
The voiceless, nameless, and faceless ‘Stranger’ has returned to haunt Mini again and this time, the dare is to stay alive. 

She must follow the Stranger’s order and enlist herself to play the dangerous game of Dare Defy on the dark web – or face dire consequences. As things begin to unfold and rapidly spiral out of control for Mini, she becomes a key suspect in a murder investigation because of her participation in this illegal game. Will Mini be able to beat Stranger and his game? Or will this game be the end of her?

------------------------------

snippet.title: Flight: Motion Poster | Mohit C | Suraj J | K. Chadda | 19th March 2021 | Reliance Ent, UFO Moviez
snippet.description:
Witness one man’s #FightToSurvive against all odds unfold in #Flight.
Presenting the official motion poster.

Releasing in cinemas on 19th March 2021.

The movie follows the journey of Ranveer Malhotra, who against all the
odds, has to face deadly obstacles on a plane in order to survive.

Actors - Mohit Chadda, Pavan Malhotra, Zakir Hussain, Viveck Vaswani,
Shibani Bedi
Director - Suraj Joshi
Producers - K. Chadda, Babita Ashiwal, Mohit Chadda, Suraj Joshi
Co-Producers - Rohit Chadda
Associate Producers - Tasneem Dhinojwala & Saife Vetmed Pvt. Ltd.
DOP - Deepak Pandey
Story, Screenplay, Dialogues - Babita Ashiwal, Mohit Chadda, Suraj Joshi
Film Editor - Rahul Mathur

snippet.title: Farmers Protest | 'Rail रोको' के दौरान यात्रियों को खाने-पीने की चीजें दे रहे हैं किसान
snippet.description:
'रेल रोको' (Rail Roko) आंदोलन में रेल यात्रियों (Railway Passengers) को हो रही असुविधा के लिए किसान यात्रियों से माफी मांग रहे हैं. इतना ही नहीं उनके लिए खाने पीने का इंतजाम करके उनकी सेवा कर रहे हैं. NDTV के सहयोगी सौरभ शुक्ला ने बहादुरगढ़ रेलवे स्टेशन (Bahadurgarh Railway Station) से ग्राउंड रिपोर्ट की. आप देख सकते हैं कि किस तरह किसान रेलवे स्टेशन पर यात्रियों को पानी की बोतलें और कुछ खाने की चीजें दे रहे हैं. इसके साथ ही यात्रियों को उनकी वजह से हुई असुविधा के लिए खेद भी प्रकट कर रहे हैं. इस बीच एक किसान ने NDTV से बात करते हुए कहा कि हमारी लड़ाई कृषि कानूनों को लेकर सरकार से हैं. हमारी लड़ाई आम लोगों से नहीं है. हमारी कोशिश है कि आम लोगों को किसी तरह की असुविधा न हो.

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

देखें NDTV इंडिया लाइव, फ़्री डिश पर चैनल नं 49

चैनल सब्सक्राइब करें : https://www.youtube.com/user/ndtvindia?sub_confirmation=1
हमारे फेसबुक पेज को लाइक करें : https://www.facebook.com/NDTVIndia
हमें ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें : https://twitter.com/ndtvindia
NDTV Apps डाउनलोड करें : http://www.ndtv.com/page/apps
अन्य वीडियो देखें : https://khabar.ndtv.com/videos
हमें इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें : https://www.instagram.com/ndtvindia/

फ़ूड वीडियो के लिए NDTV ज़ायका सब्सक्राइब करें :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8affpNLjC7-EhiAeTuGZ6g/?guided_help_flow=5

हेल्थ वीडियो के लिए NDTV सेहत वेहत सब्सक्राइब करें :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBtSjjjxahfjdZTZiLKXkhw?view_as=subscriber

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Award® winner Emma Stone (“La La Land”) stars in Disney’s “Cruella,” an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious – and notoriously fashionable – villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. “Cruella,” which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, Estella’s flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscar® winner Emma Thompson (“Howards End,” “Sense & Sensibility”). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
 
Disney’s “Cruella” is directed by Craig Gillespie (“I Tonya”) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (“Freaky Friday”), Marc Platt (“Mary Poppins Returns”) and Kristin Burr (“Christopher Robin”), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscar®- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (“Mad Max: Fury Road,” “A Room with a View”) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on “Cruella,” follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter: https://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailers​
Hashtag: #Cruella

snippet.title: Bhogilal Caught! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा - Ep 3104
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP

Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt

Background Music: Sunil Patni

snippet.description:
When Virendra and the kids pressurise Purvi to go to a party, she complies with their request. However, she gets drugged by Karan at the party and falls unconscious! What are Karan's intentions?
#ColorsTV #Molkki

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.title: IPL 2021 Auction|Will Cheeka's Picks Match MS Dhonis for CSK?|
snippet.description:
The Indian premier league auction is about to start for the 2021 season and what a show we have in our hands tonight! Watch Cheeka pick his probable team for all the teams participating in the IPL including Chennai super kings, Royal challengers Bangalore, Mumbai Indians, Kings XI Punjab, Rajasthan Royals, Sun risers Hyderabad, Delhi capitals and Kolkata Knight Riders. 

Cheeka and Anirudha Srikkanth go about their team choices for the upcoming 2021 IPL auction, and we have an exciting format to play out. Cheeka gives his expert views on why he is picking certain players while Ani goes about his own analysis on why they have chosen. 

If you do enjoy our shows then consider subscribing to our channel for more such videos. We will be covering every single game in the upcoming IPL 2021 and we hope you be a part of all our coverage. 

#IPL2021 #IPLAUCTION #CSK

IBC24 is a media and news organization. Its Head office is in Raipur, the state capital of Chhattisgarh. Our wide network of reporters in rural and urban areas has made us one of the most reliable news channels of Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh. 

We have a history of providing reliable news in matters pertaining to local, national and international significance. Many times our onscreen coverage has been picked up by various national and international news channels. snippet.title: Kaise Hoga Paiso Ka Bandobast?! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता - Ep 3105
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

localized.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

snippet.title: Tehreek ਤਹਿਰੀਕ - Satinder Sartaaj | New Punjabi Song 2021 | Beat Minister | Saga Music
snippet.description:
Saga Music Presents Tehreek ਤਹਿਰੀਕ  (The Movement) a new Punjabi song from Satinder Sartaaj’s album "Tehreek" an endeavor to portray the “Heroic Glory of Punjab”.

Iss Tehreek De Panya Utte Fateh Likh Deyo, Yaad Karn Ge Loki Apne Pate Likh Deyo - ਇਸ ਤਹਿਰੀਕ ਦੇ ਪੰਨਿਆਂ ਉੱਤੇ ਫ਼ਤਿਹ ਲਿਖ ਦਿਓ, ਯਾਦ ਕਰਨਗੇ ਲੋਕੀਂ ਆਪਣੇ ਪਤੇ ਲਿਖ  ਦਿਓ.......

Satinder Sartaj New Song Tehreek is beautiful written by Satinder Sartaaj, music given by Beat Minister

snippet.title: Graduation करते हुए College में Crorepati ऐसे बनें 👨‍🎓 | Saurabh Maurya | Josh Talks Hindi
snippet.description:
⭐👇 क्या आप भी बड़े सपने देखते है? ⭐👇
इन सपनो को आप साकार कर सकते है जोश के नए App जोश Skills के साथ!

DOWNLOAD NOW: https://joshskills.app.link/Pz7oklEdVdb

Problems तो हम सबकी जिंदगी का हिस्सा है तो फिर Problems से डरना नहीं लड़ना है आज हम सब इस जोश Talks पर  जानते है कैसे बनारस के रहने वाले Saurabh Maurya ने struggle to success की कहानी रच दी जो अभी महज 22 साल के है वो आज तीन-तीन Start up के Founder है जिनकी Net Worth तकरीबन 22 करोड़ रूपए के करीब है.


ये 22 साल का युवा हम सबके लिए Inspiration है क्यूंकि सौरभ ने ना कभी Business Education की Degree ली और ना ही बचपन से उनका Business करने का कोई Dream था.


सौरभ एक Poor Family Background से आते थे और उनका मन पढाई में भी नहीं लगता था बस उनका एक छोटा सा सपना था की उन्हें भी एक कंप्यूटर की दूकान खोलनी है.


सौरभ ने अपनी पढाई के साथ साथ ही घर के खर्चो को चलाने के लिए computer learn करने के बाद बच्चो को Coaching भी पढाई. कई बार लोगों ने मजाक उड़ाया कई लोगों ने बहुत कुछ कहाँ लेकिन सौरभ आज जहाँ भी है केवल अपने Never Stop Learning Attitude और Consistency Is The Key के रूल को फॉलो करते आये है. 
इस जोश Talk में आज हम सौरभ से बहुत सारे Important Lesson Of Life सीखने वाले है.

On this Josh talk, Today we all are going to know how Saurabh Maurya, who lives in Banaras and just 22 years old. He is the founder of 3 start-ups, whose net Worth around 22 crore rupees. This 22-year-old youth is an inspiration to all of us because Saurabh never took a degree in business education nor did he have any dreams of doing business since childhood.
He just had a small dream that he too has to open a computer shop in his village. Saurabh, along with his studies also taught coaching to children after learning himself to run household expenses. Many times people made fun of him, but wherever Saurabh is today, he has been following the rule of his never stop learning attitude and consistency is the key rule.

Watch his latest video here - 
My Dream office 🔥 - Rankers JEE Office - Saurabh Maurya IIT BHU
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qp2udm_np-s&ab_channel=IITiansVlogs

Learnings from Saurabh Maurya Josh Talk - 
How to dream big? (bade sapne kaise dekhe?)
life lessons for the entrepreneur? (entrepreneur ke liye jindgi ki seekh?)
How can anyone become an entrepreneur? (koi bhi entrepreneur kaise ban sakta hai)
Watch some of his popular videos - 
 
What Happens after Qualifying IIT-JEE || 4 Year IIT life in 1 Video |Expectations Vs Reality in IITs - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yKwWhSvVi2M&ab_channel=IITiansVlogs

Follow Saurabh Maurya or social media platforms - 
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/yashuiitian/

FACEBOOK PAGE :-https://www.facebook.com/yashuiitian



Watch More Talks on Business Motivation/ How to make business here - 
21 साल का लड़का ऐसे बना Successful Businessman | Shaurya Gupta | Josh Talks Hindi -
https://youtu.be/FjYrnazk3C0


Business में Zero से Hero ऐसे बनो | Business Success Story | Amol Roy | Josh Talks Hindi - 
https://youtu.be/D2eUesb6GQs


अमीर बनने का Success Formula | Become Rich | Sunil Vashisht | Josh Talks Hindi - 
https://youtu.be/eTm8tea1xGA

#JoshTalksHindi​ #Entrepreneur​ #Business 


Josh Talks Hindi aims to inspire and motivate you by bringing to you the best Hindi motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women’s rights, public policy, sports, entertainment and social initiatives. With 7 regional languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the challenges they face in their careers or business and helping them discover their true calling in life. 

जोश Talks मे हम देशभर से प्रेरणादायक कहानियां इकट्टठा करते हैं और आप तक पंहुचाते हैं. ये कहानियां उन लोगों की होती हैं जिन्होनें मुश्किल परिस्थितियों के आगे भी हिम्मत नहीं हारी और अपने जुनून से सफलता की नई मिसाल कायम की. इन कहानियों को सांझा करने का उद्देश्य है कि हम युवा पीढ़ी में जोश और उत्साह भर सकें. जोश Talks हर उस व्यक्ति के लिए हैं जो जीवन में नई दिशा ढूंढ रहें और कुछ अलग करके दिखाना चाहते हैं. तो जुड़िये जोश Talks से और जानिये आपके ही आस-पास जन्मी मोटीवेशनल कहानियां. 

► जोश Talks Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JoshTalksHindi 
► जोश Talks Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/JoshTalksHindi 
► जोश Talks Sharechat: https://sharechat.com/JoshTalksHindi 


-----**DISCLAIMER**----- 


All of the views and work outside the pretext of the video of the speaker, are his/ her own and Josh Talks, by any means, does not support them directly or indirectly and neither is it liable for it. Viewers are requested to use their own discretion while viewing the content and focus on the entirety of the story rather than finding inferences in its parts. Josh Talks by any means, does not further or amplify any specific ideology or propaganda.

snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: India's crushing Comeback | Humiliated England | Shoaib Akhtar
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Feb. 18: Our Perseverance Rover & Ingenuity Helicopter Arrive at Mars
snippet.description:
On Feb. 18, join us in welcoming our Perseverance Mars rover to its new home on Mars. After the entry into Mars' atmosphere and descent to landing, it will touch down in a basin called Jezero Crater. The rover will search for signs of ancient microbial life & collect samples for future missions to return. It's brought a friend to Mars as well - the Ingenuity Mars helicopter, a technology demonstration that will attempt the first-ever powered flight on another planet. 

Credit: NASA
Producer/Editor: Mark Hailey

Credits:
Directed by S. S. Surya
Produced by T.Sivakumar
Starring: Vikram Prabhu, Nikki Galrani, Bindhu Madhavi
Music by C. Sathya
Cinematography: S. Saravanan
Edited by G. Sasikumar

Synopsis
Movie starts with ‘Dhoni’ Kumar (Vikram Prabhu) trying to save a heart-broken Nadhiya (Bindu Madhavi) from committing suicide. Nadhiya narrates her poignant tale to Kumar, who actually resembles Paandi (Vikram Prabhu in another role), her lover. After listening to the partly-convincing love story between them, Kumar assures to help her find Paandi. Meanwhile, Nadhiya finds that Kumar, too, is a heart-broken person. Upon her compulsion, Kumar, a self-confessed fan of Mahendra Singh Dhoni, opens up his love story with Radha (Nikki Galrani), who is a huge fan of Rajinikanth. Will Nadhiya, who has been abandoned by her family for falling in love with Paandi, be able to find him? Will Kumar be able to live his life happily thereafter?
